items.label: Assessment
items.value: The evidence provided does not include any API functionality or state checks that confirm the capability to validate the 'Right to deletion workflow' scenario. While the expected result mentions confirming scenario behavior or producing a failure report, there is no direct evidence demonstrating that this requirement is satisfied. The linked use cases and prior steps do not provide sufficient context or evidence to validate the outcome of the exploratory step.
